title: Gauravaram Heat Wave
lead: Gauravaram is experiencing an extreme heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.20. This anomaly is at a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Gauravaram is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 17.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 41%, and the wind speed is 9.9 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief. 
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) at 0.0 GG indicates that heating is not a concern, but the high CDD value is a major issue.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
